templates: {name} runs {business} with the efficiency of someone who has calculated exactly what {pronoun} can afford to lose. {personality_line} {hook}
Ask {name} the price of anything in {town} and {pronoun} will tell you. Ask the price of anything outside it and {pronoun} will probably still tell you. {personality_line} {hook}
{name} took over {business} from {pronoun_pos} {predecessor} {years} years ago and has not stopped working since. {personality_line} {hook}
predecessors: the previous owner who left abruptly

personality_lines.greedy: {pronoun_cap} knows the value of everything and charges just under what the market will bear.
personality_lines.generous: {pronoun_cap} extends quiet credit to families who've hit hard times and rarely mentions it.
personality_lines.curious: {pronoun_pos} back room holds oddities from a dozen regions — not for sale, just interesting.
personality_lines.loyal: Regular customers get better prices. Irregular ones eventually become regular.
personality_lines.cautious: {pronoun_cap} keeps no large sums on the premises overnight.
personality_lines.cheerful: Nobody leaves {business} without hearing a joke, whether they wanted one or not.
personality_lines.cynical: {pronoun_cap} has been shortchanged, robbed, and swindled enough times to have an opinion about human nature.
personality_lines.ambitious: {pronoun_cap} has plans to expand. {pronoun_cap} is always waiting for the right moment.
personality_lines.patient: {pronoun_cap} can haggle for hours and still seem like {pronoun} is enjoying it.

hooks: A shipment of goods arrived last month that {pronoun} didn't order. {pronoun_cap} has quietly been trying to find out where it came from.
{pronoun_cap} is owed a significant sum by someone in town, and the patience is running out.
Someone has been placing orders under a false name and always sending a third party to collect.
{pronoun_cap} once handled goods for people {pronoun} would rather forget. One of them may be in {town}.
The inventory never quite matches the ledger. Not by much. But consistently.
